message:
fix(fr-store): canonicalize notify-keyspace-events on CONFIG SET to upstream AKE order (br-frankenredis-xmev)

Sub-task (h) of br-frankenredis-2di1 follow-ups. Upstream
notify.c::keyspaceEventsFlagsToString emits flags in the order
A | g$lshzxetn | KEm, where the per-class 'n' (NOTIFY_NEW) bit appears
only when the 'A' shorthand is NOT used. Our `keyspace_events_to_string`
emitted 'n' unconditionally, so `CONFIG SET notify-keyspace-events KEA`
echoed back "KEA" instead of "AKE".

* Move `n` inside the per-class else branch in keyspace_events_to_string
  to match upstream's lossy-when-A canonicalization.
* CONFIG SET notify-keyspace-events now stores the canonical form, so
  CONFIG GET returns "AKE" not "KEA".
* Update the matching golden + metamorphic tests: the strict
  `parse(canonical(flags)) == flags` invariant doesn't hold under
  upstream's lossy A-shorthand, but two consecutive canonicalizations
  still converge.
* Update core_config.json fixture and remove
  `config_get_notify_keyspace_events_after_set` from the
  live_redis_core_config_matches_runtime XFAIL list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
